title: About Chatty Buddy
paragraph1: Chatty Buddy is a clean, lightweight chat interface for OpenAI-compatible APIs. Connect to OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, OpenRouter, or any custom endpoint — your API key is stored locally and never leaves your device.
paragraph2: Supports text and vision models, custom system prompts, per-chat configuration, prompt libraries, and Google Drive sync. Runs in the browser and can be installed as an app.
paragraph3: Your conversations are saved in your browser's local storage. No account required, no data collected.
